headline: Enforcing Rigorous Logic in Claude Code Workflows
lede: Precision requires constraint. By implementing a standardized CLAUDE.md architecture, this framework forces LLMs to prioritize goal-driven execution over speculative refactoring, ensuring every change is intentional.

headline: Automating the Full Lifecycle of SEO-Driven Content
lede: This system treats editorial production as a high-throughput data flow, connecting analytics to autonomous agents. It transforms fragmented marketing tasks into a unified, context-aware pipeline of research and drafting.

headline: Deploying High-Performance LLMs Entirely Offline
lede: Data sovereignty remains the ultimate defense. By moving model inference to the edge, this gallery removes the reliance on external servers while maintaining the computational power necessary for complex agentic tasks.

headline: Developing Full-Duplex Conversational Speech Personas
lede: Human-computer interaction demands fluid, expressive feedback loops. This architecture bridges the gap between text-based reasoning and natural audio output, allowing for nuanced control over AI voice and tone.

headline: Optimizing LLM Inference for Resource-Constrained Hardware
lede: Efficiency is the final bottleneck in edge computing. This framework strips away cloud dependencies, utilizing hardware acceleration to deliver production-ready inference on mobile and IoT devices.

headline: Scaling Social Media Production With Automated Bots
lede: Content generation requires constant activity, often while the world sleeps. This automation suite manages the scraping and rendering of video assets to keep channels active without manual intervention.

headline: Standardizing Engineering Protocols for Agentic Development
lede: Scaling development requires more than just code generation; it requires repeatable engineering discipline. By embedding TDD and structured planning into the agent loop, this framework ensures consistent, verifiable software output.

headline: Building Scalable Simulation Engines for Robotic Training
lede: Reliable physics modeling is the foundation of autonomous systems. Developed by a coalition of industry leaders, this engine provides a standardized, high-performance base for training complex AI agents.

headline: Mapping Local Codebases Into Interactive Knowledge Graphs
lede: Effective AI assistance relies on deep context, not just fuzzy matches. This server provides agents with a precise architectural map of the codebase, allowing for intelligent navigation and refactoring via CLI.

headline: Simulating Market Dynamics With Multi-Agent Investment Frameworks
lede: Finance is a game of shifting perspectives and calculated risk. This prototype explores how multiple, specialized AI agents can synthesize diverse financial data to mirror the decision-making of expert investors.
